title: API Payload Normalizer
description: Sanitize API response payload dict (lowercase keys, strip values, drop None) using dict comprehension.
requirements: Lowercase keys, strip string values, filter None values
solution:
def sanitize_payload(payload):
    return {k.lower(): (v.strip() if isinstance(v, str) else v) for k, v in payload.items() if v is not None}
solutionExpl: Applies key lowercasing, string stripping, and None filtering in one comprehension.
